title: India Vehicle Registration Certificate Renewal (Form 25)
description: Renew the certificate of registration (RC) of a motor vehicle other than a transport vehicle, under Rule 52 of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 (giving effect to section 41 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988). The registered owner (or someone on their behalf) applies to the Registering Authority (Regional Transport Office, RTO) in whose jurisdiction the vehicle is, in Form 25, not more than sixty days before the certificate's date of expiry, so the vehicle continues to be validly registered. This is the periodic 'Registration/Tag' renewal counterpart to India's vehicle-ownership-transfer schema (a one-time sale event) and vehicle registration itself (Form 20, a separate process): private/non-transport vehicles are registered for a fixed validity period and must be renewed under this rule to remain lawfully on the road, unlike a one-time title transfer. Models an ordinary owner-initiated renewal of a private, non-transport motor vehicle's registration at its existing registering authority. It does not model: renewal of a transport (commercial) vehicle's certificate of registration, which follows a different fitness-certificate-linked cycle under a different set of rules; renewal after the certificate has already lapsed for longer than the state's permitted grace period; a simultaneous change of registering-authority jurisdiction; or issuance of a duplicate certificate of registration (Form 26, a separate process). It does not submit the application; the live Parivahan/VAHAN portal and the applicant's RTO are always authoritative — see VERIFICATION.md.

authority.name: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, Government of India, through the state Regional Transport Offices (RTOs), under the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

source.documentRef: Form 25 [Refer Rule 52(1)], Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored directly from the current fillable Form 25 PDF, downloadable without a bot-block from parivahan.gov.in (Parivahan Sewa, the Ministry's own e-governance portal), text-extracted with pdfjs-dist getTextContent. Cross-checked against Rule 52 of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 (page 62 of the consolidated indiacode.nic.in text used previously for in/morth/vehicle-ownership-transfer/1.0.0), and against parivahan.gov.in's own 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance page (en/content/renewal-of-rc), which corroborates the 60-day filing window, the Rule 81 fee reference, and the state-variable supporting-document list. The live parivahan.gov.in/VAHAN transactional e-service itself is state-instanced and login-gated with no public test/sandbox mode, so the full field-by-field comparison manual-source-review-v1 (Procedure step 2) requires against a live portal has not been completed. Status remains draft, not verified.

fields.name: vehicleRegistrationMark
fields.label: Register No.
fields.description: The vehicle's existing registration number (registration mark), as recorded on the certificate of registration being renewed.

fields.name: currentCertificateDateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of issue of current certificate

fields.name: currentCertificateDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Date of expiry of current certificate
fields.description: Rule 52(1) requires the renewal application to be made not more than sixty days before this date.
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(c) Date of expiry'; Rule 52(1) — 'not more than sixty days before the date of its expiry'

fields.name: registeringAuthorityIssuedOrLastRenewed
fields.label: Registering authority by which the certificate was issued/last renewed
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(d) Registering authority by which the certificate was issued/last renewed'

fields.name: applicantPresentAddress
fields.label: Applicant's present address
fields.description: The applicant's current full address, as printed in a free-form ruled line on the source form (not broken into named sub-fields there).

fields.name: updateAddressOnRenewedCertificate
fields.label: Should the present address be entered on the renewed certificate, if not already recorded there?
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'if this address is not entered in the certificate of registration, I do/do not wish that it should be so entered'

fields.name: renewalNotPreviouslyRefusedDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration: renewal of the certificate has not been refused by any registering authority
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'The renewal of the certificate has not been refused by any registering authority.'

fields.name: certificateNotCancelledOrSuspendedDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration: certificate of registration has not been cancelled or suspended by any registering authority
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I hereby declare that the certificate of registration has not been cancelled or suspended by any registering authority.'

fields.name: vehicleRegisteredAs
fields.label: The motor vehicle was registered as
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '2. The motor vehicle was registered as (a) a new vehicle (b) ex army vehicle (c) imported vehicle'

fields.name: monthYearOfManufacture
fields.label: Month and year of manufacture
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '5. Month and year of manufacture'

fields.name: numberOfCylinders
fields.label: Number of cylinders
fields.description: 0 for a Battery Operated Vehicle with no cylinders.

fields.name: cubicCapacityOrHorsePower
fields.label: Cubic capacity/horse power
fields.description: Printed as a single combined blank on the source form; represented here as free text since the unit (cc vs. hp) varies by vehicle/engine type.

fields.name: chassisNumber
fields.label: Chassis No.
fields.description: The source form additionally instructs '(Affix pencil print)' — see the pencilPrintOfChassisAndEngineNumber document.

fields.name: engineOrMotorNumber
fields.label: Engine No. or motor number (Battery Operated Vehicles)
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '10. Engine No. or motor number in the case of Battery Operated Vehicles'

fields.name: standingCapacity
fields.label: Standing capacity
fields.description: Applicable to buses and other vehicles permitted to carry standing passengers; left blank on the source form otherwise.

fields.name: sleeperCapacity
fields.label: Sleeper capacity
fields.description: Applicable to sleeper coaches; left blank on the source form otherwise.

fields.name: insuranceCertificateEnclosedDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration: certificate of insurance is enclosed for perusal and return
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I enclose the certificate of insurance for perusal and return.'

fields.name: vehicleUnderEncumbrance
fields.label: Is the vehicle subject to a hire-purchase agreement, lease agreement, or hypothecation?
fields.description: Where true, encumbranceType and encumbranceHolderName apply.
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'The motor vehicle above described is not subject to an agreement of hire-purchase, lease or hypothecation. The vehicle is: (i) Subject to hire-purchase agreement/lease agreement with... (ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of... Strike out whichever is inapplicable.'

fields.name: encumbranceType
fields.label: Type of encumbrance
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(i) Subject to hire-purchase agreement/lease agreement with...' vs. '(ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of...'

fields.name: encumbranceHolderName
fields.label: Name of the hire-purchase/lease party, or the party in whose favour the vehicle is hypothecated
fields.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(i) Subject to hire-purchase agreement/lease agreement with...' / '(ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of...'

documents.label: Certificate of registration (being renewed)
documents.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'hereby apply for the renewal of the certificate of registration which is attached'

documents.label: Certificate of insurance
documents.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I enclose the certificate of insurance for perusal and return.'; parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Insurance certificate*'

documents.label: Pencil print of the chassis and engine number
documents.sourceRef: Form 25 — '9. Chassis No. (Affix pencil print)'; parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Pencil Print of Chassis & Engine Number *'

documents.label: Specimen signature or thumb impression of the registered owner
documents.statement: Signature or thumb impression of the registered owner. Specimen signature or thumb impression of the registered owner: 1. 2. 3.
documents.sourceRef: Form 25 — signature and specimen-signature block; parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Signature Identification of owner*'

documents.label: Pollution Under Control (PUC) certificate
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Pollution under control certificate' (listed without the guidance page's asterisk that marks state-variable items)

documents.label: Certificate of fitness
documents.sourceRef: Rule 52(2) — the registering authority itself refers the vehicle to the section 56(1) fitness-testing authority and renews the certificate only after obtaining a certificate of fitness, so this is not an applicant-supplied document under the rule; parivahan.gov.in's guidance nonetheless lists 'Fitness certificate*' among the state-variable items some registering authorities ask the applicant to arrange or present directly.

documents.label: Proof of payment of up-to-date road tax
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Proof for the payment of up-to-date road tax paid*'; Guidelines — 'Pay the due taxes on vehicle, if any'

documents.label: Copy of PAN card, or Form 60 and Form 61 (as applicable)
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Renewal of Registration Certificate' guidance — 'Copy of PAN card or Form 60 & Form 61 (as applicable) *'

documents.label: Registration certificate renewal fee
documents.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I have paid the fee of Rs. .......................'; Rule 52(1) — 'accompanied by the appropriate fee as specified in rule 81'. Amount not encoded as a fixed field value since fees are set by rule, vary by vehicle class, and can change over time, consistent with in/morth/learners-licence-application and in/morth/vehicle-ownership-transfer's fee convention.

steps.title: Enclose documents and pay the fee
